## Verses (11)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | God is our harbour and our strength, a very present help in trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For this cause we will have no fear, even though the earth is changed, and though the mountains are moved in the heart of the sea; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Though its waters are sounding and troubled, and though the mountains are shaking with their violent motion. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | There is a river whose streams make glad the resting-place of God, the holy place of the tents of the Most High. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | God has taken his place in her; she will not be moved: he will come to her help at the dawn of morning. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The nations were angry, the kingdoms were moved; at the sound of his voice the earth became like wax. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The Lord of armies is with us; the God of Jacob is our high tower. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Come, see the works of the Lord, the destruction which he has made in the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He puts an end to wars over all the earth; by him the bow is broken, and the spear cut in two, and the carriage burned in the fire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Be at peace in the knowledge that I am God: I will be lifted up among the nations, I will be honoured through all the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The Lord of armies is with us; the God of Jacob is our high tower. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
